title: Résidence Le Baron
description: This apartment complex, Résidence le Baron, is located 15 miles from Dakar - Technopôle Golf Club, 20.5 miles from the Grande Mosque of Dakar, and 21.7 miles from the African Renaissance Monument. These air-conditioned apartments offer balconies, free Wi-Fi, fully equipped kitchens, private bathrooms, an on-site garden, and a terrace.
